25/06/2025, 23:34 Ordering institution | AUSTRAC

_ Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Ordering institution

Home / Ordering institution

The financial institution that accepts an instruction from a customer to transfer money
electronically to a beneficiary institution so that it reaches the intended recipient.

See

AML/CTF Act 2006 subsections 8(1), 8(2), 9(1), and 9(2)

https:/Awww.austrac.gov.au/glossary/ordering-institution
